title: Oh Look Another Christ Thread This Time Judas
display_title: Oh Look Another Christ Thread This Time Judas
wikitext:
[]: Oh Look, Another Christ Thread. This Time, Judas. Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 23, 2010 8:11 pm IRC wrote: 〈NAveryW〉Wait, I just realized something obvious I don't think I've seen addressed 〈NAveryW〉I'd be amazed if it's never been discussed before, but I don't remember seeing it so 〈NAveryW〉If there are indeed 12 members of Seele, Keel Lorenz being the leader, that would make Gendo the "Judas", right? 〈ZapX〉no 〈ZapX〉go read the gospels again 〈NAveryW〉If the eleven remaining members of Seele would be considered his "apostles", that leaves Gendo as an honorary 12th 〈NAveryW〉And obviously he betrayed Keel 〈ZapX〉you're reaching even for an eva fan 〈Zent_Circle9〉so it seems 〈NAveryW〉I'm not saying this is definitely the case, I'm saying it seems like an obvious thing to come up that I don't think has come up before 〈ZapX〉it looks interesting 〈NAveryW〉Or that I don't think I've seen brought up before 〈NAveryW〉I'm sure it's been discussed 〈NAveryW〉SOMEWHERE 〈ZapX〉i miss the standard shooter games though 〈ZapX〉i want my 13

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Jul 23, 2010 9:08 pm The major problem is that there isn't a Jesus in that equation...

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 23, 2010 9:27 pm Keel, obviously. He's mankind's savior and all.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Jul 23, 2010 9:53 pm Meh, this is one case of parallelism I can't get terribly excited about...

[]: Post by evaunit13 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 10:39 pm keel doesn't really strike me as a jesus-type figure other than his plans for saving mankind.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 23, 2010 10:43 pm And that he's the leader of a religious sect/cult that appears to be based somewhat on Judaism (remember, Seele was originally Essene). And that he has eleven followers as well as someone who appears to be a follower but who ends up betraying him.

[]: Post by evaunit13 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:07 pm i meant more along the lines of his attitude. the leadership/betrayal is set down. but he didn't seem like a friendly guy like what jesus is said to be.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:09 pm Jesus will return, "but this time, he won't be as nice." Wait a minute, isn't Jesus supposed to end the world when he returns? Crap, I just proved that Keel Lorenz is the second coming of Jesus. NO ARGUING, I PROVED IT AND YOU SHOULD FEEL BAD FOR NOT THINKING OF IT FIRST.

[]: Post by evaunit13 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:20 pm i feel bad for not thinking of it first.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:30 pm Um... there were 13 at the table during the Last Supper. 12 apostles plus Jesus equals 13. As a matter of fact, that betrayal is one of the reasons why people consider 13 to be an unlucky number. Although, still interesting.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:34 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Um... there were 13 at the table during the Last Supper. 12 apostles plus Jesus equals 13.

[]: Post by C W St. J Nobbs » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:36 pm So, what you're saying is that someone is going to nail Keel to a tree?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:38 pm NAveryW wrote: Twelve members of Seele plus Gendo the betrayer equals thirteen, silly.

[]: Post by BeoX2 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:47 pm Damnit. Why do I never spot the cool things?

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Jul 24, 2010 2:08 am BeoX2 wrote: Damnit. Why do I never spot the cool things?

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 24, 2010 3:50 am Obviously Shinji is Jesus. He saves the world and everything. Shinji wrote: Father...Father betrayed me!

[]: Post by Sun Stealer » Sat Jul 24, 2010 7:10 am Sometimes, a tophat is just a tophat.

[]: Post by Halicat » Sat Jul 24, 2010 10:07 am So much for those 'Kaworu died for your sins' bumper stickers then

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jul 24, 2010 11:05 am Halicat wrote: So much for those 'Kaworu died for your sins' bumper stickers then

[]: Post by Halicat » Sat Jul 24, 2010 11:12 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: one could argue that Gendo is a reference to Satan.
